name: Gohan Son
description:
__Race:__ Half-Saiyan, Half-Human  
__Height:__ 175 cm (5'9”)

Gohan is a shy and studious intellectual, and as a child lacks the Saiyan fighting spirit. However, because he is forced to protect the ones he loves, he taps into his vast half-breed Saiyan potential and emotional reserves, becoming one of the most powerful Z Fighters. As an adult, he abandons his superhero duties and uses his mind, as a premier scholar of the Dragon World. Gohan was extremely powerful, surpassing powerhouses like Goku and Vegeta at times. 

(Source: Dragon Ball Super Exciting Guide, Character Edition)
